revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:日本の法令]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:日本の法令]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:日本の法令]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:日本の法令]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Removed redirect to [[en:Template:日本の法令]]
revision.text: [[ja:Template:日本の法令]]

revision.comment: importing the jawiki
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "ファイル:" to "File:"
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Text replacement - "[[Category:11]]" to ""
Immanuelle moved page [[Template:日本の法令]] to [[Template:Laws and Regulations of Japan]]: Text replacement - "日本の法令" to "Laws and Regulations of Japan"
Text replacement - "日本の法令" to "Laws and Regulations of Japan"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23511227343|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24271391609|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
